title: Chiroshokha
desc: Kamalini, a widowed mother, finds comfort in her late husband's best friend, Swatantra. Together, they navigate life's challenges and societal pressures - will their connection survive?. S01 E434.

desc: Trio's dreams of different futures intertwine with complex romantic entanglements. S01 E50.

title: Gangaa
desc: Flung into the Ganges at birth, Gangaa survives to fight injustice. When her path crosses righteous cop Arjun, will destiny spark love or divide them?

title: Rangamati Tirandaj
desc: Rangamati steps up to help Namita's family bounce back after a tough time, showing incredible strength and support when they need it most. Community really matters!

title: Parashuram
desc: An intense story centers on a relentless quest for justice, as characters confront societal evils and fight to restore peace and order.

title: Kusum Dola
desc: Shimul hates Ranajay, an IPS officer responsible for her father's death. Circumstances force her to marry him.

title: Tumi Chherona Haat Pothe
desc: A young couple's heartfelt journey of love and sacrifice is tested by family, fate, and the challenges that threaten to keep them apart.

title: Milon Hobe Kotodine
desc: Elaa, a spirited matchmaker, sparks an unexpected connection with cynical heir Gora at a luxury brand's dating app launch, challenging love and fate itself.

title: Compass
desc: A prodigal girl living under a borrowed identity and carrying a hidden wound, dares to chase her passion for science, defying a rigid system that resists her brilliance.

title: Prof. Bidya Banerjee
desc: A heartfelt tale exploring emotions of longing, hope, and quiet courage as characters confront situations that reshape their understanding of love, loss, and meaningful choices.

title: O Mor Dorodiya
desc: Ranieeta Dash stars as the long-awaited female lead, marking a major comeback, while Biswajit Ghosh plays the male lead opposite her, signaling a compelling pairing.

title: Sudhu Tomari Jonyo
desc: A soft hearted dreamer falls for a guarded soul and their fragile love faces pride, misunderstandings and sacrifices that test whether destiny can truly unite them.
